company.name: The Company Check | Empower Your Business with Data-Driven Insights
company.description:
# The Company Check | Empower Your Business with Data-Driven Insights

## Insights That Drive Growth

Explore verified intelligence on companies, teams, directors, investors, funding, acquisitions, financials, regulatory signals, and more — across India and global markets.

![Market and Research](https://thecompanycheck.com/Images/home/market-and-research.png)

Market and Research

### Market & Company Research

Understand companies beyond the surface—profiles, ownership, leadership, activity, and financial depth across India and global markets.

Quickly map peers, validate claims, and build a complete picture before you shortlist. Designed for analysts, consultants, and strategy teams.

[Know more](https://thecompanycheck.com/products/solutions/market-research)

![Due Diligence](https://thecompanycheck.com/Images/home/Due-Diligence.png)

Due Diligence

### Due Diligence & Risk Checks

Verify before you decide—filings, litigation, charges, regulatory signals, and historical changes in one structured view.

Reduce back-and-forth by checking critical risk indicators early in the workflow. Ideal for KYC, compliance, procurement, and credit teams.

[Know more](https://thecompanycheck.com/products/solutions/due-diligence)

![Investment Deal Intelligence](https://thecompanycheck.com/Images/home/Investment-&-Deal-Intelligence.png)

Investment Deal Intelligence

### Investment & Deal Intelligence

Track funding, acquisitions, IPOs, investors, and deal participants with structured data built for analysis and comparison.

Follow deal activity, identify key players, and understand who backs whom across ecosystems. Built for investors, corporate development, and research teams.

[Know more](https://thecompanycheck.com/products/solutions/investment-deal-intelligence)

![Monitoring and Ongoing Intelligence](https://thecompanycheck.com/Images/home/Monitoring-&-Ongoing-Intelligence.png)

Monitoring and Ongoing Intelligence

### Monitoring & Ongoing Intelligence

Stay updated without manual tracking—follow companies, people, and market signals and catch important changes early.

Track what matters to you and revisit decisions with a clear audit trail of changes. Built for ongoing portfolios, vendors, and watchlists.

[Know more](https://thecompanycheck.com/products/solutions/monitoring)

## Complete visibility into how a company operates, grows, and changes.

Each company profile brings together legal structure, ownership, financial performance, filings, litigation exposure, regulatory activity, and key management—presented in a clean, structured format for fast analysis. Go deeper with historical timelines, corporate actions, director movements, compliance signals, and financial trends that help you track evolution, assess risk, and understand a company's true operating reality over time.

![Company Profile](https://thecompanycheck.com/Images/home/company-profile.png)

![Company Insight](https://thecompanycheck.com/Images/home/company-overview-insight.png)

Databases & Research Tools

Access structured business intelligence across companies, people, brands, deals, and markets—backed by powerful research tools designed for real workflows.

Comprehensive Databases

Company & legal entities, people & management, global brands, funding, investors, acquisitions, IPOs, and news.

Advanced Research Tools

Powerful search & filters, screening and due diligence, exports & reporting, and continuous tracking.

Built for accuracy, scale, and fast decision-making—everything you need in one connected platform.

Indian Legal Entity Reports—ready in minutes, built for decisions

Get a comprehensive, structured report for any Indian company: identity, directors & KMP, ownership, financials, charges, compliance, alerts, and litigation—compiled into a clean, printable format.

### What's inside the report

Built to match real-world workflows: research, due diligence, credit checks, vendor onboarding, compliance screening, and risk review.

#### Company identity & snapshot

CIN/PAN, ROC, incorporation, status, contact, business segment.

#### Directors & KMP

Current & past directors, KMP, director profiles and affiliations.

#### Ownership & control

Shareholding, promoter/public split, director holdings, FIIs, group structure, ODI.

#### Financials & ratios

Balance sheet, P&L, cash flow, key ratios, auditors—presented for fast reading.

#### Charges, peers & related corporates

Open/closed charges, peer comparison, and potentially related entities.

#### Compliance, alerts & risk signals

Regulatory alerts + GST/EPFO/CSR/Credit rating & other compliance checks.

#### Litigation intelligence

Pending & disposed cases—filed by/against the company (where available).

PDF-ready Structured tables Risk-focused Export-friendly

Comprehensive Report Indian Legal Entity

Trending sectors & segments

Discover fast-moving segments across markets—use these as starting points for research, screening, and monitoring.

[Technology](https://thecompanycheck.com/sector/technology/eul52yn6fjm2w2eg6)

Top segments by coverage • 6,77,362 total profiles

Trending • 6 segments

Global coverage by country

Browse coverage across countries and regions. Hover the map to see counts and jump into results.

Global coverage

Hover hotspots to view country coverage

![World map](https://cdn.statcdn.com/static/img/worldmap.svg)

Top coverage

Highest profile volume by geography

Explore millions of companies — effortlessly

Access structured, verified intelligence on 7M+ companies across industries, sectors, and global markets. From early-stage startups to large enterprises, discover ownership, leadership, funding, financials, acquisitions, and market signals — all in one powerful platform.

Free account with essential features

Instant access to company reports

Enterprise solutions available

company.name: BiZiDEX - Find and be Found with Bizidex
company.description:
# Find and be Found with Bizidex

Popular Categories

## Browse Top Categories

Featured Listings

## Bizidex in United States

New in Bizidex

## New in United States

Latest News

## News and Updates

#### [Advertising The Basics](https://bizidex.com/blog/advertising-the-basics)

Advertising is a marketing strategy that helps you market your business to increase sales, get new customers, or make your target audience aware about your products and services.

#### [What is a business directory?](https://bizidex.com/blog/what-is-a-business-directory)

A business directory is an online list of businesses within a particular niche, location, or category. One way local businesses can get found by online searchers is through inclusion in business directories.

#### [Tips For Guaranteed Online Success For Businesses](https://bizidex.com/blog/tips-for-guaranteed-online-success-for-businesses)

Businesses are created every day, but not all of them succeed as initially expected. Numerous factors might lead to business failure especially during the current times. Competition is so stiff and in many cases business ventures that don’t keep up with the competition end up defunct

#### [BiZiDEX: The Ultimate Online Marketing Solution for Businesses](https://bizidex.com/blog/bizidex-the-ultimate-online-marketing-solution-for-businesses)

BiZiDEX has redefined online marketing in many ways. It is an online business index which provides leads for local business ventures from the locality of the business. It also goes as far as providing the leads in a specified area, country or worldwide depending on consumer preferences

Our Pricing
